title: Create server/lib/file-store.ts - JSON file storage with atomic writes
acceptance_criteria: File store provides CRUD operations for admin_key.json, sessions.json, admin_recovery.json
Atomic writes using temp file + rename pattern
Recovery code generation with SHA-256 hashing
completion_summary: Created file-store.ts with atomic writes, file locking, and all storage operations for admin key, sessions, challenges, and recovery codes
